name: leadflow-ai
description: LeadFlow AI - A lightweight, mobile-first CRM for small businesses

scripts.build: bun run build:frontend && bun run build:backend
scripts.test: bun run test:backend && bun run test:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && wrangler d1 migrations apply leadflow-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd backend && wrangler d1 migrations apply leadflow-db --remote
